notes:
What's new in V3.1.6:
• Seedance 2 now supports 1080p generation for cleaner, more production-ready AI video
• Seedance 2 now supports Transition Mode (start frame / end frame)
• GPT Image 2 — replaces GPT Image 1.5 with sharper detail and better prompt accuracy
• Topaz image upscaling now includes expanded Topaz model support, including Standard MAX and Wonder, with fixes for more reliable upscale behavior
• Fixed Brand Voice / Copy Card transcript workflows
• Fixed Topaz image upscaling reliability issues
• Fixed a SAM 3 rotoscope issue some users hit when tracking an entire video
• Story Cutter now mirrors the exact clips on the source timeline more accurately, including upper layers like V2 and V3, and better supports broadcast-style start times
• Fixed Kling Motion Control Attach character reference bug
• Fixed Elements not working with Seedance 2
